cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.0.2)

if(WIN32 AND CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR STREQUAL "x86_64" OR CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR STREQUAL "AMD64")
	ExternalProject_Add(${3RDPARTY_NLOHMANN}
	DOWNLOAD_COMMAND ""
	CONFIGURE_COMMAND ""
	CMAKE_ARGS ""
	BUILD_COMMAND ""
	INSTALL_COMMAND ""
	)
elseif(APPLE)
	ExternalProject_Add(${3RDPARTY_NLOHMANN}
	URL ${NLOHMANN_URL}
	CONFIGURE_COMMAND ""
	CMAKE_ARGS ""
	BUILD_COMMAND ""
	INSTALL_COMMAND mkdir -p ${TDV_INSTALL_DIR}/3rdparty && cp -rf ${OPENCV_BINARY_PATH}/. ${TDV_INSTALL_DIR}/3rdparty)
else()
	ExternalProject_Add(${3RDPARTY_NLOHMANN}
	DOWNLOAD_COMMAND ""
	CONFIGURE_COMMAND ""
	CMAKE_ARGS ""
	BUILD_COMMAND ""
	INSTALL_COMMAND mkdir -p ${3RDPARTY_INCLUDE_DIR}/nlohmann && cp ${TDV_3RDPARTY_DIR}/nlohmann/json.hpp ${3RDPARTY_INCLUDE_DIR}/nlohmann
	)
endif()
